features.name: Chemspace Catalog Browser
features.description: Standalone application (browsePath: Chem) for searching and browsing the Chemspace virtual compound catalog directly within Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: The app function (role=app, browsePath=Chem) is the sole entry point for catalog browsing; changelog 1.2.1 explicitly moved it under the Chem browse section.

features.name: Molecule Availability Panel
features.description: Context panel that shows similar molecules available for purchase in Chemspace for the currently selected compound, including similarity scores.
features.evidence_summary: 'Databases | Chemspace' (role=widgets,panel, description=Chemspace Samples) provides per-molecule availability lookup; changelog v1.0.2 added similarity scores and GROK-17022 fixed errors in this panel.

features.name: Compound Pricing
features.description: Panel and batch function that surface Chemspace pricing by country and supplier for individual molecules and entire datasets.
features.evidence_summary: Both functions share 'Prices' in name and description — one is a context panel, the other a batch retrieval function; changelog v.next tracks multiple pricing fixes including caching and undefined-price fallthrough.

features.name: Chemspace ID Resolution
features.description: Resolves molecules to their Chemspace identifiers and highlights columns carrying the chemspace_id semantic type, enabling enrichment via the 'Add new column' dialog.
features.evidence_summary: getChemspaceIds maps molecules to Chemspace IDs; the semValueExtractor highlights the chemspace_id semantic type — changelog 1.1.4 explicitly introduced both together.

features.name: Chemspace API Client
features.description: Low-level HTTP utility handling multipart form requests, OAuth token refresh, and retry logic against the Chemspace API v4.
features.evidence_summary: queryMultipart is the sole infrastructure function for Chemspace HTTP calls; changelog v.next describes token-refresh and retry rewrites that are scoped entirely to this layer.
